allow: Bash(npm install prisma@latest @prisma/client@latest @prisma/adapter-pg pg 2>&1 && npm install --save-dev @types/pg 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next:', pkg.dependencies.next\); console.log\('prisma:', pkg.devDependencies?.prisma || pkg.dependencies.prisma\); console.log\('@prisma/adapter-pg:', pkg.dependencies['@prisma/adapter-pg']\); console.log\('pg:', pkg.dependencies.pg\);")
Bash(timeout 30 npx prisma db pull 2>&1 || true)
Bash(timeout 30 npx prisma db push 2>&1 || true)
Bash(timeout 60 npx prisma migrate dev --name full-schema 2>&1)
Bash(timeout 90 npx prisma migrate dev --name full-schema 2>&1)
Bash(node -e "require\('zod'\)" 2>&1 && echo "zod OK" || echo "zod NOT installed")
Bash(npm install class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge lucide-react 2>&1)
Bash(npx shadcn@latest add textarea card badge 2>&1)
